title: pholiurus incurvus subsp. filiformis
intro: Pholiurus incurvus subsp. filiformis, also known as Pholiurus or Pholiurus filiformis, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been employed in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Pholiurus incurvus subsp. filiformis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Pholiurus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
